# Caf√© Athena Site Development

## Stack Reference

| Layer | Tool | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| Framework | Astro 6 | Static site, content collections |
| CSS | Tailwind CSS v4 | Vite plugin (no config file) |
| Animation | GSAP 3 | Client-side only |
| Search | Pagefind | Built into `npm run build` |
| Fonts/Icons | Check `site/src/styles/` | Confirm before adding new |
| Node | ‚â•22.12.0 | Enforced by `engines` in `package.json` |

## Project Layout (site/)

```
site/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ src/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ content/          # Built recipe and glossary markdown (DO NOT edit manually)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ recipes/      # Processed from The Manual/ by prepare-content.py
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ glossary.md
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ content.config.ts # Astro content collection schema (source of truth for frontmatter)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ layouts/          # BaseLayout, RecipeLayout, SectionLayout
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pages/            # index, glossary, academy, brigade, larder, search, [...slug]
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ plugins/          # remark-ref-images.mjs (custom Remark plugin)
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ styles/           # Global CSS
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ public/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ images/           # Processed hero images (XX-YY.webp)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ scripts/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ prepare-content.py  # Syncs The Manual/ ‚Üí src/content/recipes/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ deploy.sh           # Full build + rsync to FastComet
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ generate-registry.py
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ astro.config.mjs      # Astro config (site URL, Tailwind, Remark plugins)
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ package.json          # Scripts: dev, build, preview
```

## Critical Constraints

### heroImage Frontmatter (CRITICAL)
- Field must be **filename only** ‚Äî e.g. `"07-10.webp"` ‚Äî never a path.
- Template at `pages/[...slug].astro` prepends `/images/` automatically.
- A full path like `"/images/07-10.webp"` causes a broken double-path.

### Content Files
- Files under `site/src/content/recipes/` are generated by `prepare-content.py`.
- Direct edits to content files are acceptable for quick fixes but may be overwritten on next pipeline run.
- For structural/schema changes, edit `content.config.ts`.

### Tailwind CSS v4
- Uses the Vite plugin (`@tailwindcss/vite`) ‚Äî no `tailwind.config.js`.
- Classes are discovered automatically. Do not add a config file.

## Workflows

### 1. Assess the Request

Classify before acting:

| Type | Examples | Approach |
|------|---------|---------|
| Cosmetic | Color, spacing, font tweak | Implement directly |
| Functional | New component, interactive feature | Plan ‚Üí implement |
| Structural | New page, new content type, routing | Plan ‚Üí implement |
| Content pipeline | prepare-content.py changes | Caution ‚Äî affects all recipes |
| Deploy | Push to live | Always test locally first |

### 2. Plan Phase (for Functional or Structural changes)

Before writing code:
1. Identify all files that need to change (layouts, pages, styles, scripts).
2. Note any schema changes to `content.config.ts`.
3. Confirm no changes risk overwriting content files during the next pipeline run.
4. Present the plan and confirm with the user before implementing.

For cosmetic/quick fixes, skip to implementation.

### 3. Implement

Work within the `site/` directory. Files outside it (The Manual, scripts) are a separate domain unless the request explicitly crosses the content pipeline.

**Component changes**: Edit the relevant `.astro` file in `src/layouts/` or `src/pages/`.  
**Style changes**: Edit files in `src/styles/` or use Tailwind classes inline.  
**New pages**: Create `.astro` files in `src/pages/`.  
**Config changes**: Edit `astro.config.mjs` (Remark plugins, site URL, etc.).

### 4. Test Locally

```bash
cd site && npm run dev
```

- Dev server starts at `http://localhost:4321` by default.
- Verify the change looks and behaves correctly before committing.
- For search-related changes, run a full build (`npm run build`) since Pagefind only runs at build time.

```bash
cd site && npm run build && npm run preview
```

### 5. Commit to GitHub

Stage modified files **by name** ‚Äî do NOT use `git add -A` (per `CLAUDE.md`, it can capture unintended files like local `.DS_Store` or images placed during a separate workflow):

```bash
git add site/src/pages/index.astro site/src/styles/global.css   # example ‚Äî adjust per change
git commit -m "feat: <description of change>"
git push
```

Follow conventional commits: `feat`, `fix`, `style`, `refactor`, `chore`.

### 6. Deploy to FastComet

**Only run when explicitly asked to deploy / push live.**

```bash
bash site/scripts/deploy.sh
```

This script:
1. Runs `prepare-content.py` (syncs Manual ‚Üí content)
2. Builds the site (`npm run build`)
3. `rsync`s `dist/` to `fastcomet-passiton:~/public_html/cookbook/` via SSH  
   ‚Äî with `--delete` flag (removes stale files) and protects `.webp` images

‚öÝÔ∏è Do not run `prepare-content.py` manually before deploying if hero images have been placed directly in `site/public/images/` ‚Äî it can wipe them. Check `recipes.json` (`heroImageOptimized`) before running the pipeline.

## SSH / Remote

- SSH alias: `fastcomet-passiton` (configured in `~/.ssh/config`)
- Remote path: `~/public_html/cookbook`
- Live URL: `https://cookbook.kevinward.com`

## GitHub

- Repo: `kevinward1969/cafe-athena`
- Branch: `main`
- All site changes should be committed and pushed before deploying.

## Content Schema (content.config.ts)

Required frontmatter for recipe files:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `title` | string | Required |
| `index` | string | Required (e.g. `"07-10"`) |
| `chapter` | number | Required |
| `chapterName` | string | Required |
| `type` | `"recipe"` \| `"technique"` | Required |
| `heroImage` | string (optional) | Filename only ‚Äî e.g. `"07-10.webp"` |
| `referenceImages` | string[] | Defaults to `[]` |
| `subtitle` | string (optional) | |
| `keywords` | string[] | Defaults to `[]` |
| `cuisine` | string | Defaults to `""` |
| `style` | string | Defaults to `""` |
| `dietary` | string | Defaults to `""` |

## Pending Site Work (from PROJECT_STATUS.md)

### Part IV: The Expo (Ch. 13‚Äì15) ‚Äî Site Section Needed
A new fourth section of the site (alongside Academy, Brigade, Larder):
- **Ch. 13 ‚Äî Planning**: Menu engineering, course sequencing, ticket flow
- **Ch. 14 ‚Äî Plating**: Composition, visual language, plate architecture
- **Ch. 15 ‚Äî Service**: Hospitality, pacing, the handoff
- Needs: site section design, nav integration, `SectionLayout.astro` usage (or new layout)

### Section & Chapter Banner Images
Full-bleed panoramic banners (~1920√ó380px WebP) for each section page and chapter page.
- Planned prop: `bannerImage` on `SectionLayout.astro` (not yet implemented)
- Naming: `banner-academy.webp`, `banner-brigade.webp`, `banner-larder.webp`, `banner-ch03.webp` ‚Ä¶ `banner-ch12.webp`
- All placed in `site/public/images/`
- Generated via Gemini Gem 2 ‚Äî placement in this skill's scope only, not generation

### Chapter 12 Format Audit
20 entries live in Ch. 12 (Les Fonds). Format audit pending ‚Äî run `/format-audit Chapter 12` in Claude Code (not this skill's domain, but affects site content).

## Checklist Before Marking Work Complete

- [ ] Change scoped to `site/` unless pipeline work was explicitly requested
- [ ] No `heroImage` frontmatter uses a path prefix
- [ ] Tailwind v4 ‚Äî no `tailwind.config.js` created
- [ ] Locally tested (`npm run dev` or `npm run build && npm run preview`)
- [ ] Committed and pushed to GitHub
- [ ] Deploy only run if user explicitly asked for it
